podman run --name claude-pod-TIMESTAMP --rm -w /HOME/subway/claude-pod-sanitize --userns=keep-id --security-opt label=disable -v /HOME/.bash_history:/HOME/.bash_history:ro -v /HOME/.bash_logout:/HOME/.bash_logout:ro -v /HOME/.bash_profile:/HOME/.bash_profile:ro -v /HOME/.bashrc:/HOME/.bashrc:ro -v /HOME/.betty:/HOME/.betty:ro -v /HOME/.bun:/HOME/.bun:ro -v /HOME/.cache:/HOME/.cache:ro -v /HOME/.claude:/HOME/.claude -v /HOME/.claude.json:/mnt/.claude.json:ro -v /HOME/.config:/HOME/.config -v /HOME/.cursor:/HOME/.cursor:ro -v /HOME/.gitconfig:/HOME/.gitconfig:ro -v /HOME/.local:/HOME/.local -v /HOME/.npm:/HOME/.npm:ro -v /HOME/.pki:/HOME/.pki:ro -v /HOME/.ssh:/HOME/.ssh:ro -v /HOME/.tmux:/HOME/.tmux:ro -v /HOME/.tmux.conf:/HOME/.tmux.conf:ro -v /HOME/.zcompdump:/HOME/.zcompdump:ro -v /HOME/.zprofile:/HOME/.zprofile:ro -v /HOME/.zshrc:/HOME/.zshrc:ro -v /HOME/bin:/HOME/bin:ro -v /HOME/converge-repo:/HOME/converge-repo:ro -v /HOME/converge-tests:/HOME/converge-tests:ro -v /HOME/finch-signals:/HOME/finch-signals:ro -v /HOME/google-cloud-sdk:/HOME/google-cloud-sdk:ro -v /HOME/obsidian:/HOME/obsidian:ro -v /HOME/src:/HOME/src:ro -v /HOME/subway:/HOME/subway -v /HOME/tmp:/HOME/tmp:ro -v /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew:/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew:ro -v /usr/share/fonts:/usr/share/fonts:ro -v /etc/fonts:/etc/fonts:ro --memory=4g --device nvidia.com/gpu=all -e CLAUDE_POD_NO_YOLO=1 -e FOO=bar -i claude-pod:latest
